# MuleSoft Amazon Kinesis Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.0) of Amazon Kinesis Connector documentation.
> See [Amazon Kinesis Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-kinesis-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon Kinesis Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams Connector 2.0 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-kinesis-connector/latest/amazon-kinesis-connector-examples.md)
- [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams Connector 2.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-kinesis-connector/latest/amazon-kinesis-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Amazon Kinesis Data Streams Connector 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-kinesis-connector/latest/amazon-kinesis-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Amazon Kinesis Data Streams Connector to Version 2.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-kinesis-connector/latest/amazon-kinesis-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams Connector 2.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-kinesis-connector/latest/amazon-kinesis-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams Connector 2.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-kinesis-connector/latest/index.md)
